description: linode_image_sharegroup_by_image_list envelope: count and the full proto ImageShareGroup elements under the image_sharegroups key. Go previously emitted a FormatListResponse {count,image_sharegroups} of raw structs and Python over-wrapped {message,count,image_id,sharegroups,page,...}; the proto envelope is the fix. This sub-resource list paginates and never echoes a filter.

image_sharegroups.label: shared-images
image_sharegroups.description: Images shared with the partner account
